title: indie Semiconductor's Latest Vision Processor Design-win Momentum Accelerates, Awarded Sensor Innovation of the Year
text: Indie Semiconductor's iND880 camera video processor system-on-chip family continues to secure significant design-win momentum with global original equipment manufacturers and has been recognized as Auto Sensor Innovation of the Year by AutoTech Breakthrough Awards. The company secured a $25 million production order for its radar chipset from a Tier 1 partner, driven by demand from two OEM customers. The company commenced volume shipments of its vision processor to NIO for electronic mirror camera deployment and ramped production of its iND880 chip for camera mirror systems with the largest Chinese OEM. Indie leveraged its LiDAR system-on-chip for an advanced mobile robot deployment with a major global logistics company and captured a perception software design win with Mahindra. In Q1 2025, indie secured significant design wins for its iND880 vision processor with a North American OEM and for its eMirror application with a Korean OEM, and also achieved multiple design-wins in China for its GW5 vision processor. Indie Semiconductor's go-to-market centers on direct OEM and Tier-1 relationships, which best protect long sales cycles and high-value design wins.
